# n5 Evidence: knowledge-lookup .toml rename — gitlab + gitea editions

## task
Rename docs-lookup.toml to knowledge-lookup.toml in the gitlab and gitea plugin trees and update their config/agents.toml to point at the new name, mirroring the github edition (n4). Content must be byte-identical to the n4 github edition (Section 3.2 of n2 spec), all three files using "for Codex" (not forge-specific), no tools array, evidence path updated to `.cache/knowledge-lookup.md`.

## non_tdd_reason
Category: config / scaffolding — .toml Codex agent profile renames and content updates across two edition trees. These are agent prompt / config files with no behavioral logic; there is no natural failing unit test for renaming a .toml and updating its developer_instructions prose. Verified by: file content inspection + byte-identity diff + git diff tracking confirmation.

## write_set
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/docs-lookup.toml` → `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml` (git mv + content rewrite)
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/config/agents.toml` (docs-lookup → knowledge-lookup block rename + description + config_file update)
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/docs-lookup.toml` → `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml` (git mv + content rewrite)
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/config/agents.toml` (docs-lookup → knowledge-lookup block rename + description + config_file update)

## verification_commands

### 1. git status (rename tracking)
```
$ git status --short
RM agents/docs-lookup.md -> agents/knowledge-lookup.md
 M docs/agents-source.md
RM plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/docs-lookup.toml -> plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml
 M plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/config/agents.toml
 M plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-plan-validator.js
RM plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/docs-lookup.toml -> plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml
 M plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/config/agents.toml
 M plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-plan-validator.js
RM plugins/kaola-workflow/agents/docs-lookup.toml -> plugins/kaola-workflow/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml
 M plugins/kaola-workflow/config/agents.toml
 M plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js
 M scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js
 M scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js
?? kaola-workflow/issue-249/
```
Exit code: 0. `RM` status = renamed + modified (rename detected + content rewritten) for both gitlab and gitea .toml files.

### 2. "for Codex" + no tools array + evidence path check
```
$ grep -n "for Codex|for GitLab|for Gitea|tools|docs-lookup|knowledge-lookup" \
    plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml \
    plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml
```
Result: All lines reference "for Codex" (not "for GitLab"/"for Gitea"). No `tools` array key found. Evidence path is `.cache/knowledge-lookup.md`. Exit code: 0.

### 3. Byte-identity across all three knowledge-lookup.toml files
```
$ diff plugins/kaola-workflow/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml \
       plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml
$ diff plugins/kaola-workflow/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml \
       plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml
```
Output: (none — files are byte-identical). Echo: "All three knowledge-lookup.toml files are byte-identical". Exit code: 0.

### 4. config/agents.toml updates confirmed
```
$ grep -n "knowledge-lookup|docs-lookup" \
    plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/config/agents.toml \
    plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/config/agents.toml
```
Result:
- gitlab line 9: `[agents.knowledge-lookup]`
- gitlab line 11: `config_file = "./agents/kaola-workflow/knowledge-lookup.toml"`
- gitea line 9: `[agents.knowledge-lookup]`
- gitea line 11: `config_file = "./agents/kaola-workflow/knowledge-lookup.toml"`
No remaining `docs-lookup` tokens. Exit code: 0.

## before_result
All 4 target files in the old `docs-lookup` state:
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/docs-lookup.toml`: role sentence "You are the docs-lookup role for Kaola-Workflow for Codex.", evidence path `.cache/docs-lookup.md`, narrow Purpose section.
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/config/agents.toml`: `[agents.docs-lookup]` block.
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/docs-lookup.toml`: byte-identical to gitlab edition (confirmed pre-change).
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/config/agents.toml`: `[agents.docs-lookup]` block.

## after_result
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml`: role sentence updated to "knowledge-lookup role for Kaola-Workflow for Codex", Context7 primary + runtime-gated WebSearch/WebFetch prose, evidence path `.cache/knowledge-lookup.md`, no tools array. Byte-identical to github edition.
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/config/agents.toml`: `[agents.knowledge-lookup]` with updated description and config_file path.
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/agents/knowledge-lookup.toml`: byte-identical to gitlab and github editions.
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/config/agents.toml`: `[agents.knowledge-lookup]` with updated description and config_file path. Byte-identical to gitlab config.

build-green: all 4 target files updated, git mv rename tracking confirmed, byte-identity verified across all three editions.
